tool.name: OGS: RemoveGhostData
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'RemoveGhostData'.
tool.command: mkdir inputs; # Verzeichnis für saubere Trennung #for $m in $input: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for removeghostdata #for $m in $input: --input "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for --output output_1.vtu

param.name: input
param.label: input
param.help: Input (.pvtu). The partitioned input mesh file

tool.help: This tool runs the **RemoveGhostData** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
